author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (iommufd VIOMMU + KVM dirty-tracking):

- drivers/iommu/iommufd-viommu.md: covers iommufd/viommu.c (~430 lines) — virtual IOMMU + virtual device for nested-guest IOMMU emulation: IOMMU_VIOMMU_ALLOC ioctl creates VIOMMU object backed by parent HWPT-paging providing L2 translation + per-vendor type (VTD_S2/ARM_SMMUV3/AMD_V2), IOMMU_VDEVICE_ALLOC creates per-virtual-device companion with virt_id (guest BDF or guest PASID) → real device mapping in viommu's vdev_id xarray, IOMMU_VIOMMU_INVALIDATE translates guest invalidate descriptors via vdev_id lookup before forward to per-vendor cache_invalidate_user, IOMMU_VIOMMU_PRI_RESPONSE forwards guest PRI response to real device, cross-vendor VIOMMU rejected at alloc (viommu_type must match host vendor). 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + vdev-id-uniqueness + cross-vendor-rejected + invalidate-translation-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to nested_invalidate.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus guest-cmd → translate → real-HW round-trip.
- virt/kvm/dirty-tracking.md: covers virt/kvm/dirty_ring.c (~270 lines) — per-vCPU dirty-ring for live migration: per-vCPU lockless SPSC ringbuffer of struct kvm_dirty_gfn entries with explicit acquire-release semantics (smp_store_release on producer + smp_load_acquire on consumer), KVM_CAP_DIRTY_LOG_RING_ACQ_REL enable via KVM_ENABLE_CAP with ring_size 1024-131072 (power-of-2), per-vCPU mmap region at KVM_DIRTY_LOG_PAGE_OFFSET, producer-local push from vCPU thread on SPTE D-bit transition (no cross-CPU contention), consumer drains via head/tail ringbuffer pattern, KVM_RESET_DIRTY_RINGS ioctl write-protects consumed entries' gfns to force re-fault on subsequent write, soft-full threshold (50% capacity) → KVM_REQ_DIRTY_RING_SOFT_FULL → next vmexit returns KVM_EXIT_DIRTY_RING_FULL, hard-full → vCPU blocks until userspace consumes, per-VM ring + bitmap modes mutually-exclusive. 11 REQ / 6 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (ring-UAF + dirty-index-overflow + gfn-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to dirty_ring.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus producer→consumer→reset→write-protect round-trip.

Total state: 276 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 42 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (42): + iommufd-viommu + kvm-dirty-tracking.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-viommu, design-virt-kvm-dirty-tracking.

Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/intel-pasid.md (Intel PASID-table mgmt + PRQ for SVM) + virt/kvm/x86-emulate.md (x86 instruction emulator for unrestricted-guest fallback + invalid-guest-state recovery).
